content.full_text:
City of Vista

September 4, 1991

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street Ste. 610
Sacramento, CA. 95814

RE: Confirmation of telephone advice

Please send me written confirmation of the advice I was given on the telephone yesterday.

I asked if there is a limit that a person or a married couple can contribute to our Mayor's committee in connection with a recall action that is being promoted.

The Mayor has an existing controlled committee called "Friends of Gloria McClellan," whose purpose is to support the Mayor. There is a new recipient committee that has been formed called "Taxpayers for Responsible Government," that is working toward the qualification of a recall of the Mayor.

The Mayor wishes to know what, if any, the limit is for contributions from a single individual, a company, and a married couple, who wish to contribute to assist her committee in fighting against the recall effort.

I was told on the telephone by your office that there are no limits on the amount of money that any one person, company, or married couple can contribute. I was also told that if the Mayor is recalled, and a special election is called to fill the vacancy, there would be limits on contributions in connection with that special election.

Thank you for your written confirmation.

Very truly yours,

Jo Seibert
City Clerk
